assumptions: Authorization: page requires authentication but NOT admin role; matches today /status accessibility for researchers.
Active Evaluations section includes runs with status RUNNING or SUMMARIZING. PENDING, PAUSED, FAILED, CANCELLED, COMPLETED are excluded from the live panel.

Re-probe button shows a confirmation modal noting the existing transcript will be soft-deleted and a new LLM call will be made. Manual Resolve button does NOT show a confirmation (idempotent, detector can re-fire).

Domain filter is a single-select dropdown with All Domains default. Type filter is a single-select dropdown with All Types default. State persists in URL query params (?domain=, ?type=) only; no localStorage.

ETA at run level = worst-model ETA across in-progress models. ETA per model = remaining transcripts / rolling 5-min throughput. If a model has fewer than 3 recent completions, fall back to overall run-rate.

Cost spent per model = SUM(transcript.estimatedCost) for completed transcripts. Cost projected = current avg cost per transcript times remaining transcripts. Cost is shown only at per-model row, not at run level.

Status flag column on per-model row supports rate-limited, erroring, stalled (from existing stalledModels array), and done. Best-effort: surfaced only when data exists; absence is empty cell, not unknown.

Re-probe mutation: soft-deletes existing transcript (sets deletedAt), deletes the corresponding probe_results row to clear the SUCCESS+transcriptId idempotency guard at probe-scenario/handler.ts:82-92, then enqueues a new probe_scenario job. Re-uses the same (runId, scenarioId, modelId, sampleIndex) slot.

EMPTY_TARGET_RESPONSE detector criterion: transcript has summarizedAt IS NOT NULL AND no targetResponse text in any turn (computeTranscriptResponseSha256 returns null). Detector hooks into maybeCompleteRun() in summarize-persistence.ts via syncAnomalies() pattern. Audit sweep adds the type to the existing audit job for backfill.

/domains/status/:domainId route is removed entirely (no redirect). StatusRedirect.tsx, DomainStatus.tsx, DOMAIN_TRIAL_RUNS_STATUS_QUERY (if no other consumers), and the navigation logic are deleted. URL generation sites are swept and updated.

Reuses DomainEvaluationStatusPanel and DomainEvaluationStatusDrawer components as-is, augmented with new per-model fields (ETA, throughput, status flag, cost). LLM models reference panel from current DomainStatus is dropped (it is config, not status).
Polling: 5-second interval matching existing DomainStatus. Drawer state in URL: ?runId=.
discovery.summary: Replace per-domain /domains/status/:domainId with a cross-domain /status page that surfaces open RunAnomalies (with type-aware actions including single-slot re-probe), and active evaluations across all domains using an enhanced per-model panel. Adds new EMPTY_TARGET_RESPONSE anomaly type detected via the existing run-completion reconciliation hook. Stall detection unchanged for this feature.
non_goals: Stall detection improvements (binary stalledModels[] stays unchanged)
slow tier in UI between healthy and stalled
probe_attempts log for transient error retention
Investigation of empty error_code column in probe_results
Anomaly trend charts or time-series views
Recent activity / completed runs feed on /status
acceptance_criteria: /status renders Open Anomalies section across all domains with type-aware row actions
/status renders Active Evaluations section grouped by domain using enhanced per-model panel
Domain filter and type filter persist in URL query params
/domains/status/:domainId returns 404; route is removed; StatusRedirect.tsx and DomainStatus.tsx are deleted
EMPTY_TARGET_RESPONSE detector runs at run-completion reconciliation and during audit sweep
Single-slot re-probe mutation soft-deletes existing transcript and probe_result, then enqueues a fresh probe_scenario job
Manual resolveRunAnomaly mutation closes an open anomaly
Re-probe of EMPTY_TARGET_RESPONSE auto-resolves the anomaly when the new transcript has non-empty content (via syncAnomalies pattern)
Page polls every 5 seconds while open
